unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字母s加单词pent(被关起来的)，度过了一段时间。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: a+bout(回合)，大约就是这个回合。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In October 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 飞行的过去式，把y变成了ew。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In October 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Octo(八)原本是八月，后来变成了十月。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He also made a video in space.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: vi(看)+deo，就是可以看的录像。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 感到自豪的,感到骄傲的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I was very proud of him.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: p+round(圆)，骄傲得挺起了圆圆的胸膛。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I want to go into space someday too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: some(一些)+day(日子)，总会有那么一天。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Helen Keller was born in the US in 1880.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: b+orn(装饰)，出生时世界为我装饰。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字母a和s，作为一个词。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: be+came(来)，变成了这样。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She drew letters in Helen's hand and taught her to spell.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: let(让)+ter，让字母排好队。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She drew letters in Helen's hand and taught her to spell.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: s+pell(皮)，拼写单词要脱掉外皮看核心。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She wrote a book about herself and travelled all over the world.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: her(她)+self(自己)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She wrote a book about herself and travelled all over the world.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: all(全部)+over(结束/上方)，遍及所有地方。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Helen lived to be eighty-seven.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: i在这个词里发短音/ɪ/，活着就是一种力量。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She is a role model for blind people, and also for you and me.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: role(角色)+model(模型)，角色的模范。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My father, Yang Liwei, is a taikonaut, and he is very famous.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: tai(太空)+ko(人)+naut(船员)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My mother and I went to the airport to meet my father.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: air(空气)+port(港口)，飞机的港口。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: b+line(线)+d，眼睛里只有黑线。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: d+eat(吃)-t+f，耳朵被吃掉了。
